description_long: This is a discarded aluminum beverage can with a vibrant red background and colorful graphics, including a large cartoon character in traditional attire on the front. The can features multiple areas of printed text in Chinese, including nutritional information and branding, as well as a blue certification mark. The top of the can is silver with a standard pull tab, and the bottom is also metallic with a stamped production code. The can's surface is glossy and smooth, reflecting light, and there are no visible dents, rust, or damage. A barcode is present on the side, along with additional product details and decorative elements. The overall appearance suggests it once contained a soft drink or similar beverage, now empty and discarded.
description: A glossy red aluminum beverage can with colorful cartoon graphics, Chinese text, and a silver pull tab top. The can is undamaged and features a barcode and detailed labeling.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cartoon character, main branding, and prominent Chinese text on a red background.
description_view_1: Side view displaying nutritional information, a blue certification mark, and part of the decorative border.
description_view_2: Bottom view revealing the metallic base with a stamped production code and no visible graphics.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the barcode, additional text, and a partial view of the cartoon character.
attribute_brand_logo: A cartoon character in traditional attire with a yellow and red emblem above its head, possibly representing the brand; no clear English brand name visible.
attribute_barcode: Vertical black-and-white barcode on the side label.
